jsonLd.title: Shadowfax is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shadowfax. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
